steps.title: Warm-up — Say It Aloud
steps.description: Say these 5 sentences aloud 3 times: 'Let me explain.', 'Let him go.', 'Let her speak.', 'Let us try.', 'Don't let this pass.'

steps.title: Read Today's Lesson
steps.description: Read all 8 sections of the Day 13 lesson on Use of Let. Pay special attention to the formula, common mistakes, and the comparison with Allow/Make.

steps.title: Vocabulary Practice
steps.description: Study today's 110 vocabulary words. Focus on permission verbs (allow, permit, forbid, restrict) and action verbs commonly used with 'Let'.

steps.title: Practice Questions
steps.description: Solve the first 50 Hindi-to-English translation questions on Use of Let. Say each answer aloud before writing.

steps.title: Speaking Drill
steps.description: Go through all 12 speaking drill sets. Repeat each sentence 3 times with correct stress and pronunciation.
